message:
feat(learn): enhance Learning Hub UI with polished components

- Refactor markdown-components.tsx with proper prop sanitization
  - Comprehensive REACT_MARKDOWN_INTERNAL_PROPS set to strip all AST props
  - Add copy-to-clipboard functionality for code blocks
  - Proper TypeScript types for all components

- Upgrade sidebar with visual polish
  - Add progress bar showing completion percentage
  - Add connector lines between lessons for visual hierarchy
  - Add glow effects for current and completed lessons
  - Smooth transitions on all interactive elements

- Improve mobile navigation
  - Add progress dots showing current lesson position
  - Add safe area padding for notched devices (pb-safe)
  - Add glow effects on primary action button
  - Add touch feedback with scale transforms

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
